title: The New Order: Worlds Collided | Dwarf
description: Adds the dwarf origin from The New Order: Worlds Collided
body: This mod is a add-on to the Origins mod. this was made and created by me solely, I made this for The New Order: Worlds Collided modpack and now it can be added to your own modpacks and worlds. this mod add the origin Dwarf as it sounds your about a block tall but with that you have faster mining speed, but with all the buffs there are debuffs like not being able to swim in water and being blind whilist being in sunlight
